title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Cropin Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cropin Asia Pacific Associates family as a Frontend Developer in Navi Mumbai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cropin Asia Pacific Associates:
Cropin Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cropin Asia Pacific Associates!
